title: Ride Any Mob
description: Mount and control every mob in Minecraft!
body: # Ride any mob in Minecraft! --- ### How to Mount: All you need to do is walk up to a mob while holding a saddle, get really close and you will start riding and controling it! --- ### Controls: For all mobs, simply hold W or S to go forward or backward, and steer with your mouse. Super easy! - For aquatic mobs, to swim up hold spacebar and let go to sink. - For flying mobs, hold spacebar to fly upwards and release to fly down. --- ### Other: If you wish for a specific mob to no longer be rideable in your world, you can navigate to data/ride/tags/entity_type/rideable.json and remove the mob from the list. In this current version of the datapack, you can not ride the Wither, Ender Dragon, or the Creaking, however this may change with an update so be sure to follow the pack for updates! --- **That's all, have fun, thank you for downloading!** --- If you wanted to try this out in multiplayer, use code LAUNCH with my affiliate link on Shocbyte for 25% off! https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10878 ---
